turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Hey, uh,

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para motivos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: part of pretty good AI.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Am I speaking with Paul?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Oh, uh, hey, no, this is Dana. I’m actually calling because I had a fall in the shower—kind of slipped because of my pregnant belly—and now I’ve got some real bad pain in my pelvic area. I want to see about booking a CT scan to figure out what’s going on.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks for letting me know, Dana!

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Are you calling to schedule this appointment for yourself or for someone else?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, it’s for me, for sure.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please provide your data first.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Sure, it's March 22nd, 1979.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I need your full name, including your last name, along with your date of birth.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Could you please provide your last name?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, my full name is Dana Whitfield.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Thanks, Data.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Is that correct?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Just to confirm you're experiencing pelvic pain after a fall and want to be seen as soon as possible.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, exactly. It’s pretty intense, so I’m hoping to get it checked out soon.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: I’m open to the first available, honestly. The sooner, the better.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Let me check for the soonest available appointment for an urgent evaluation. One moment.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Alright, I’m here.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: It looks like you already have an appointment scheduled for this type of urgent evaluation.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: If you need to reschedule or cancel that appointment, I can help with that.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to make a change to your existing appointment?

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Or do you need to speak with someone from the office?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Wait, I didn’t know I had one booked. Are you sure? I might need to double-check that.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I see in the system that there's already an urgent evaluation appointment booked for you. If you'd like, I can connect you with someone from the office to review the details and make sure everything is correct.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like me to do that?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Yeah, that’d be helpful. Let’s review what’s set up already, so I know what’s going on.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I see you'd like to review your appointment details and discuss scheduling a CT scan.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: I can connect you to our patient support team for help with this.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to continue with me or should I transfer you to a live agent?

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Let's go ahead and connect me to a live agent. That’d be great.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Please wait.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Alright, I’ll hang tight.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: connecting you to a representative.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: Hello.

turns.speaker: PGAI AGENT
turns.text: you've reached the pretty good AI test line.

turns.speaker: PATIENT (bot)
turns.text: Oh, wait—I think there’s some confusion. I’m actually trying to get that appointment sorted out. Could you help me with that before we hang up?
